installCmdTemplate: First check if SkillHub store is installed. If not, follow https://skillhub-1388575217.cos.ap-guangzhou.myqcloud.com/install/skillhub.md to install SkillHub, then install the {slug} skill. If already installed, directly install the {slug} skill.
